ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region where the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product sold */,
  "year_week" INTEGER /* Year and week number (YYYYWW) of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "new_quantity" INTEGER /* New quantity of the product after the sale */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the sale */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* The exact date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* The price at which the product was sold */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* The discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, online transfer) */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* The ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the region, which can be used in external systems */,
  "region_address" TEXT /* The physical address of the region */,
  "region_phone" TEXT /* The phone number for the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the region for time-based analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the product */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* The unit of measure for the product (e.g., pieces, kilograms) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_lead_time" INTEGER /* The lead time (in days) for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_category_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_parent_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "supplier_website" TEXT /* The website URL of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* The physical address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_rating" TEXT /* A rating for the supplier (e.g., based on delivery times, quality of products) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, staff) */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region the user is associated with */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* The password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the user */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., stock in, stock out, adjustment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_note" TEXT /* A note or comment about the transaction */,
  "warehouse_id" TEXT /* The ID of the warehouse where the transaction occurred */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* The batch number of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The expiry date of the product (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
